chronos_rules: Strategos is the most important piece. If it dies, you lose.
Warden is a strong defender (+2 points).
Scout is fast but weak (+1 point).
Center core (4,4) gives a 2x multiplier to points.
Adjacent 8 core tiles give a 1x multiplier.
Eliminate enemy pieces by jumping over them or surrounding them (depending on specific rule implementation).
Control the core to win by points if no assassination occurs.
chronos_strategies: Prioritize moving the Strategos towards the core but keep it protected.
Use Wardens to block enemy paths to your Strategos.
Use Scouts to harass enemy pieces and quickly capture core positions.
If an enemy piece is vulnerable, attack it.
Always check if your Strategos is in danger before making a move.
The center core is the most valuable position on the board.
